scripts.dev:stop: pkill -f 'tsx watch src/main.ts' 2>/dev/null || true; pkill -f 'next dev --port 3100' 2>/dev/null || true; for p in 3000 3100 3002 3003 3004 3005 3006 3007 3008 3009 3010 3011 3012 3013 3014; do lsof -ti:$p | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null || true; done
scripts.dev:stack: pnpm dev:stop && pnpm --filter @connectpro/common build && dotenv -e .env -e .env.local -- concurrently -n gateway,auth,user,conn,post,feed,msg,notif,search,job,co,media,analytics,rec,web -c blue,green,yellow,magenta,cyan,white,gray,red,brightBlue,brightGreen,brightYellow,brightMagenta,brightCyan,brightRed,brightWhite "pnpm --filter @connectpro/api-gateway dev" "pnpm --filter @connectpro/auth-service dev" "pnpm --filter @connectpro/user-service dev" "pnpm --filter @connectpro/connection-service dev" "pnpm --filter @connectpro/post-service dev" "pnpm --filter @connectpro/feed-service dev" "pnpm --filter @connectpro/messaging-service dev" "pnpm --filter @connectpro/notification-service dev" "pnpm --filter @connectpro/search-service dev" "pnpm --filter @connectpro/job-service dev" "pnpm --filter @connectpro/company-service dev" "pnpm --filter @connectpro/media-service dev" "pnpm --filter @connectpro/analytics-service dev" "pnpm --filter @connectpro/recommendation-service dev" "pnpm --filter @connectpro/web dev"
